data.title: CloseMate introduces Fully Autonomous CRM powered by AGI-grade logic, shifting from SaaS to Service as Software. Early access opens Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Hawthorne, California, CloseMate launched early access to the first Fully Autonomous CRM globally. This CRM is powered by AGI-grade logic, marking a transition from Software as a Service to Service as Software. This innovative approach entails buying assured outcomes rather than traditional software offerings.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin urges Ethereum to ready for quantum computing threat, aiming for long-term function without frequent upgrades.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, one of the founders of Ethereum, believes that the network should be designed to operate smoothly for numerous decades without needing frequent updates. This includes the ability to withstand potential threats from quantum computers in the future.

data.title: USV market forecast to grow from $600 million in 2025 to $2.6 billion in 2033. Navies shifting to multi-mission assets.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USV) for Defence and Security - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report highlights a shift in the USV sector from experimental models to versatile assets integrated into naval frameworks, predicting a move from single-function USVs to interconnected system-of-systems configurations. This evolution sees USVs operating as cooperative components within broader naval systems.

data.title: WHOOP forms the Massachusetts AI Coalition to advance AI innovation in the state, uniting leading companies and investors.
data.description: In Boston, WHOOP, a human performance company, revealed the establishment of the Massachusetts AI Coalition. This coalition comprises prominent technology, manufacturing, healthcare, consumer, and industrial firms and investors located or heavily active across the Commonwealth. The initiative is unique, being led by companies, and aims to enhance cooperation, speed up practical AI integration, and solidify Massachusetts' position as a worldwide artificial intelligence pioneer.

data.title: Tempus AI (NASDAQ: TEM) stock up after reporting 83% year-over-year growth with $1.27 billion in revenue for 2025.
data.description: The stock of Tempus AI Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) saw an increase on Monday following the release of its initial fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results. The company reported total revenue of approximately $1.27 billion for the year, showcasing an impressive 83% increase compared to the previous year. This growth includes about 30% organic growth, excluding Ambry. Tempus AI anticipates a quarterly revenue of roughly $367 million for the fourth quarter, displaying an 83% rise year over year. Additionally, Tempus AI has entered into two new lucrative contracts.

data.title: David Mitchell, 75, known for advocacy on drug price hikes, passed away after battling terminal cancer.
data.description: Upon learning of his terminal cancer diagnosis, he utilized his background in public relations to shed light on the exorbitant prices of medication.

Israel: The law to remove the Police Investigations Department from the Attorney General's Office was approved in the first reading 57-47

data.title: Net at Work acquires NCS to expand in the Midwest, gaining top talent and clients. Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: New York City - On January 12, 2026, Net at Work, a prominent managed service provider in North America, made a strategic acquisition to enhance its regional footprint. The move not only bolstered their presence in the Midwest but also brought in high-caliber professionals and extended their existing client partnerships. This action marked a significant development for the company, showcasing their commitment to growth and expansion in key markets.

data.title: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I closes $287.5 million IPO of 28.75 million units at $10 each on Nasdaq (Ticker: ZKPU).
data.description: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I has closed its initial public offering of 28,750,000 units, including 3,750,000 units from the underwriters' over-allotment option. Priced at $10.00 per unit, the offering raised $287,500,000 for the Company. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. The warrants will become exercisable 30 days after the initial business combination, allowing holders to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50. The units are listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "ZKPU," with the Class A ordinary shares and warrants expected to trade separately under "ZKP" and "ZKPW" respectively.

data.title: Accelint wins $151B SHIELD IDIQ contract with Missile Defense Agency.
data.description: Accelint recently disclosed in Orlando, Florida that it has secured a significant government contract for the Missile Defense Agency SHIELD program. The contract falls under the indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) framework, boasting a substantial ceiling value of $151 billion. This noteworthy development underscores Accelint's successful entry into the defense sector with a promise of innovation and long-term partnership.

data.title: Space stocks, led by Firefly, soar in 2026. ASTS consolidates near all-time highs around $91-$100 after 260% rally in 2025. RKLB gains over 20% in 2026, reaching prices around $85.
data.description: Space stocks have seen a significant surge in the new year, with many companies posting double-digit gains year-to-date. Factors contributing to this rise include support from the Trump administration, technical achievements, and the potential SpaceX IPO. AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) has consolidated near all-time highs around $91-$100 after a 260% rally throughout 2025, gaining 28% year-to-date. However, some institutional analysts have expressed bearish sentiment, with Scotiabank issuing a downgrade. Rocket Lab Corp. (NASDAQ: RKLB) has also seen strong bullish momentum, with the stock surging over 65% in a month to reach prices around $85 in early January. Rocket Lab stock has gained more than 20% in 2026 alone. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sport Clips Haircuts raised $1.22M for veterans' scholarships & provided free haircuts. Total donations for VFW Foundation exceeded $16M.
data.description: The VFW Foundation has received over $16 million in donations to assist veterans with transitioning to civilian careers through education. In a press release from January 12, 2026, it was reported that Sport Clips Haircuts' Help A Hero Scholarship Campaign in 2025 contributed $1.22 million towards supporting military service members in pursuing educational opportunities.

data.title: Ex-NYC Mayor Eric Adams endorses "NYC Token" crypto initiative to combat hate with launch event in Times Square.
data.description: On Monday, Eric Adams, the ex-mayor of New York City, publicly supported a digital currency named "NYC Token" at Times Square.

GOLD AND SILVER HIT RECORDS AMID FED PROBE Gold and silver futures surged to record highs after news of a DOJ investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, driving investors toward safe-haven assets. Gold rose 2.5% to $4,604.30 an ounce, while silver jumped 7.3% to $84.61.
